questionText: API latency is variable & app is sluggish. How do you design UI safely?

whatWorkedWell: Structured your answer using the STAR method.
Mentioned optimistic updates as a strategy.
overallTakeaways: You have a solid understanding of frontend performance concepts.
Consider mentioning specific caching strategies like SWR or React Query.
Try to keep your introduction slightly more concise.

keyMoments.description: Explained how to use React Suspense and Error Boundaries.
Fumbled slightly when explaining event loop and microtasks.
Successfully wrapped up the answer with a focus on perceived performance.
